name: agent-companion
description: Agent delegation companion for Codex CLI. Spawns a subagent that owns a dedicated MCP bridge and delegates token-heavy coding tasks to your chosen agent target (OpenCode or Copilot) while keeping the parent context clean.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate large coding tasks to your chosen agent target.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex subagent that delegates implementation, review, and research work to your chosen agent target (OpenCode or Copilot) through a private MCP bridge, per-host runtime state, and completion drain hooks.
defaultPrompt: Ask the agent companion to review this repository
Delegate this implementation to the agent companion
